[[Private/Legends|Private]] '''Caronil''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as member of [[Bria Tharen]]'s [[Red Hand Squadron]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was [[Death/Legends|killed]] during the [[Capture of the Helot's Shackle|taking]] of the [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] ship [[Emancipator (CR90 corvette)|''Helot's Shackle'']].

==Appearances==
*''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' {{1st}}
